Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly elevated chloride, high LDL cholesterol, and low HDL cholesterol, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Glucose control is adequate (HbA1c and fasting glucose normal). Renal function and microalbumin/creatinine ratio are normal. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia and monitoring cardiovascular risk factors.
